title: check_log
html:
check_log

File Read

Context: sudo, unprivileged

check_log -F /path/to/input-file -O /dev/stdout

File Write

Context: sudo, unprivileged

check_log -F /path/to/input-file -O /path/to/output-file
excerpt: check_log File Read Context: sudo, unprivileged check_log -F /path/to/input-file -O /dev/stdout File Write Context: sudo, unprivileged check_log -F /path/to/input-file -O /path/to/output-file
